# `GeoJSON`

[![GoDoc](https://godoc.org/github.com/tidwall/geojson?status.svg)](https://godoc.org/github.com/tidwall/geojson)

This package provides GeoJSON utilties for Go. It's designed for [GeoEngine](https://github.com/tidwall/geoengine).
